projects.title: Agency Digital Application Platform
projects.shortDescription: Nationwide React Native platform for insurance agents to submit digital life insurance applications, integrated with the Life Core System.
projects.detailedDescription: Led end-to-end architecture and delivery of a nationwide Agency Digital Application Platform used by insurance agents across Egypt. Fully integrated with the Life Core System. Defined system architecture, API contracts, data models, security standards, and integration strategies. Coordinated Mobile App teams, Life Core System teams, Actuarial, Operations, Sales, and external vendors.
achievements: Nationwide deployment for Egyptian insurance agents
Full integration with Life Core System

projects.title: Group Insurance Full-Stack System
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack Group Insurance management system covering the complete insurance lifecycle — Sales, Underwriting, Operations, Claims, Collections, and Actuarial.
projects.detailedDescription: Designed and developed a comprehensive Full-Stack Group Insurance System using React.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, and SQL Server. Architected the database schema, REST APIs, and end-to-end business workflows. Implemented role-based workflows covering the full insurance lifecycle. Led UAT phase with business stakeholder sign-off.
achievements: Covers 6 departments: Sales, Underwriting, Operations, Claims, Collections, Actuarial
Full database schema architecture and REST API design
Financial reports for management and actuarial

projects.title: FRA Regulatory Compliance System
projects.shortDescription: Python-based data pipeline validating, transforming, and securely submitting insurance data to the Egyptian Financial Regulatory Authority.
projects.detailedDescription: Designed and developed multiple Python-based applications with database integration to validate, transform, and submit insurance data. Integrated securely with FRA REST APIs (GET/POST), including authentication, authorization, logging, and audit trails. Streamlined regulatory reporting workflows, reducing manual processing and operational risk.
achievements: Secure FRA REST API integration with full auth and audit trails
Automated data validation and transformation pipeline
Reduced operational risk for FRA compliance

projects.title: Decoding Management System
projects.shortDescription: Enterprise web app migrating internal decoding operations from MS Access to SQL Server with a React/Next.js frontend, RBAC, and audit trails.
projects.detailedDescription: A modern web application for managing internal decoding operations, migrated from MS Access to SQL Server with a React/Next.js frontend. Features role-based access control, real-time notifications, and comprehensive audit trails for enterprise-level workflow management.
achievements: Role-based Access Control (BC Users, Operations Users, Admin)
Database Migration from MS Access to SQL Server

projects.title: Blog CMS
projects.shortDescription: TypeScript/Next.js content management system with rich text editing, media management, SEO, and admin dashboard.
projects.detailedDescription: A modern Content Management System built with TypeScript and Next.js for creating, editing, and managing blog content. Features a powerful admin interface with rich text editing and media management capabilities.

projects.title: Job Tracker
projects.shortDescription: React app for tracking job applications, interview schedules, and job search organization.
projects.detailedDescription: A comprehensive React application for tracking job applications, managing interview schedules, and organizing the job search process.

projects.title: iOS Checklist
projects.shortDescription: Native iOS task management app with Swift/UIKit, Core Data persistence, and due date warnings.
projects.detailedDescription: A native iOS task management application built with Swift and UIKit. Features comprehensive task tracking with status updates, priority management, and a clean, iOS-native user interface.
achievements: Native iOS task management with Core Data persistence
Status tracking with due date warnings

projects.title: BullsEye Game
projects.shortDescription: Swift/UIKit iOS guessing game with slider controls, score tracking, and smooth animations.
projects.detailedDescription: An engaging iOS guessing game built with Swift and UIKit. Players test their precision by guessing numbers within a target range.

projects.title: Pet Appointments
projects.shortDescription: React appointment scheduling system for veterinary clinics with pet profiles and calendar integration.
projects.detailedDescription: A React-based appointment scheduling system designed for veterinary clinics and pet care services.

projects.title: My Todos
projects.shortDescription: Fast Vite-based todo app with priority levels, completion tracking, and local persistence.
projects.detailedDescription: A fast and efficient todo application built with Vite for lightning-fast development and build times.

suggestedProjectsToBuild.title: Insurance Quote Calculator API
suggestedProjectsToBuild.rationale: Showcases domain expertise in insurance + Node.js/Python backend skills

suggestedProjectsToBuild.title: React Native Insurance Agent Demo
suggestedProjectsToBuild.rationale: Public demo version of the Agency Platform concept — shows cross-platform mobile architecture

suggestedProjectsToBuild.title: Regulatory Data Pipeline (Open Source)
suggestedProjectsToBuild.rationale: Generic FRA-style data validation pipeline to demonstrate compliance system design

suggestedProjectsToBuild.title: Architecture Decision Records (ADR) Repo
suggestedProjectsToBuild.rationale: Documents architectural decisions made in enterprise systems — great for FAANG positioning
